meta.title: Aurora - Journey To Your Family History
meta.description: Explore your ancestral past with AI-powered conversations

navbar.createTreeError: Error creating tree. Please try again.

home.heroTitle: Chat with your ancestors you never knew through AI
home.heroIntro: Imagine sharing stories with your great-grandmother again, watching your life unfold as a beautiful visual journey, or keeping precious family memories safe forever. Aurora brings families closer together across generations with the warmth of AI magic.
home.heroQuote: What if you could keep your family close, always?
home.heroBody: Aurora creates cozy digital spaces for your family. Build loving AI companions based on your cherished family members, share stories and memories, then enjoy heartwarming conversations that feel wonderfully real. Turn your life stories into beautiful visual tales and keep all your family treasures safe. Create a warm digital home for generations to come.
home.demoTitle: Start Your First Heartwarming Chat Free
home.demoDescription: AI-generated ancestor conversation demo - Grandmother Mary from 1920s family history
home.featuresTitle: Aurora Features: Reconnect with Cherished Family
home.featuresDescription: Experience heartwarming AI-powered family connections that go beyond traditional family tree research. Aurora creates warm conversations with beloved family members, preserves precious memories through beautiful visual storytelling, and helps you feel closer to your family heritage through loving artificial intelligence.
home.howToTitle: How to Create Warm Family Connections
home.howToDescription: Creating heartwarming conversations with your cherished family members is easier than you think. Here's the simple 3-step process that transforms precious memories into cozy digital experiences.
home.futureDescription: We're constantly innovating to bring you even more immersive ways to connect with your ancestors. Here's what's coming next in Aurora:

items.title: Heartwarming Conversations
items.description: Chat with your beloved family members as if they were sitting right next to you by the fireplace. Our AI lovingly captures their unique voice, personality, and wisdom.
features: Personalized responses based on their life

items.title: AI Personality Training
items.description: Build detailed personality profiles by sharing stories, photos, and memories. The more you share, the more realistic conversations become.

items.title: My Story Visual Narratives
items.description: Transform your life stories into cinematic visual experiences. AI creates beautiful cartoon-style scenes with narration from your memories.

items.title: Time Vault Messages
items.description: Record video messages for the future. Leave wisdom for children not yet born or messages to be opened on special dates.

items.title: Memory Vault Storage
items.description: Preserve your family memories forever. Store audio recordings, photos, videos, and written stories in your secure digital vault.

items.title: Private & Secure
items.description: Your family memories are precious. We protect them with bank-level security and give you complete control over your data.

items.title: Share Their Beautiful Story
items.description: Tell us about your beloved family member - their warm personality, favorite sayings, life experiences, and the precious stories you remember. Even small details help create a more heartfelt conversation experience.

items.title: AI Learns with Love
items.description: Our caring AI studies everything you've shared to understand your family member's unique personality, speech patterns, and worldview. It lovingly learns how they might respond to different topics and questions.

items.title: Start Your Chats!
items.description: Once your family member's AI companion is ready, you can start having warm conversations! Ask them about their life, seek gentle advice, or simply enjoy a cozy chat. Each conversation helps the AI learn and become even more loving.

items.title: AI Video Conversations
items.description: Watch your ancestors come to life with AI-generated video responses. See their facial expressions and gestures as they share their stories.

items.title: Voice Replication
items.description: Hear your ancestors speak in their authentic voices. Upload audio samples to create personalized voice models for each ancestor.

items.title: Interactive Family Tree
items.description: Explore your family history through an immersive, interactive tree. Click on any ancestor to instantly start a conversation.

demoVideo.title: See Aurora in Action
demoVideo.description: Watch the genealogical network and video calls - connect with your family across generations.
demoVideo.iframeTitle: Aurora demo: genealogical network and video calls
demoVideo.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.

chatDemo.name: Grandmother Mary
chatDemo.message1: Hello sweetheart! I've been waiting so long to meet you. Your mother told me so much about you in her letters. I wish I could have held you when you were little.
chatDemo.message2: Grandma, I never got to hear your voice or learn your stories. What was it like growing up during the Depression? What would you want me to know about our family?
chatDemo.message3: Oh honey, those were hard times but we found joy in small things. I want you to know that our family has always been strong - we helped our neighbors, never went to bed angry, and always made room at the table for one more. That strength lives in you too, dear one.

story.signInRequired: Sign in to create your story.
story.title: My Story
story.heroDescription: Turn a life story into a narrated video. Create a digital legacy for future generations.
story.heroHint: You're not just filling out a form - you're preserving a voice.
story.sectionStoryDescription: Share the life story or biography. We'll turn it into scenes and narration.
story.storySubjectPlaceholder: Name of the person this story is about
story.storyBodyPlaceholder: Write the story you want to preserve - memories, key moments, what you want future generations to know...
story.sectionScenesDescription: Key moments from your story. Scenes will appear as the pipeline runs.
story.scenesHelper: Scene previews will appear here when the pipeline generates them.
story.sectionProgressDescription: Your narrated video is being created. This may take a few minutes.
story.sectionVideoDescription: Watch your story come to life with narration and scenes.
story.videoPending: Your video will appear here once generation is complete.
